<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Poolican — Stratégie META Ads 2026</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito+Sans:wght@300;400;600;700;800;900&family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --navy:   #003D73;
  --blue:   #0079BF;
  --cyan:   #00C2E0;
  --cyan2:  #0099B8;
  --light:  #E0F5FA;
  --lighter:#F0FAFD;
  --white:  #FFFFFF;
  --dark:   #001F3F;
  --text:   #1A3A5C;
  --muted:  #5A7FA0;
  --bg:     #F5FBFD;
  --green:  #00A870;
  --orange: #F07820;
  --red:    #E03040;
  --glass:  rgba(0,194,224,0.08);
  --gb:     rgba(0,194,224,0.18);
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html,body{width:100%;height:100%;background:var(--white);font-family:'Nunito Sans',sans-serif;color:var(--text);overflow:hidden;cursor:none}

#cursor{position:fixed;width:10px;height:10px;background:var(--cyan);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);box-shadow:0 0 16px var(--cyan)}
#cring{position:fixed;width:34px;height:34px;border:1.5px solid rgba(0,194,224,.4);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9998;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:transform .18s ease-out}

#bgc{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:0;pointer-events:none}

#deck{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:1}
.slide{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center;padding:68px 72px 56px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .5s ease}
.slide.active{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}

/* TOP BAR */
#topbar{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:52px;z-index:100;background:var(--white);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,194,224,.15);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 36px;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(0,61,115,.06)}
.bbadge{background:var(--navy);color:var(--white);font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:3px;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:4px}
.bsep{width:1px;height:18px;background:rgba(0,61,115,.15);margin:0 12px}
.bsub{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted)}
#ctr{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--muted)}
#ctr span{color:var(--cyan)}

/* NAV */
#nav{position:fixed;bottom:24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;z-index:100;background:var(--white);border:1px solid rgba(0,194,224,.2);padding:9px 16px;border-radius:40px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,61,115,.1)}
.ndot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(0,61,115,.15);cursor:pointer;border:none;transition:all .3s}
.ndot.active{background:var(--cyan);width:20px;border-radius:3px;box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(0,194,224,.5)}
.nbtn{background:none;border:1px solid rgba(0,194,224,.25);color:var(--navy);padding:5px 13px;border-radius:14px;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Nunito Sans',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;transition:all .25s}
.nbtn:hover{background:var(--light);border-color:var(--cyan);color:var(--cyan2)}

/* REVEALS */
.rv{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px);transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease}
.rv.v{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.rl{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-28px);transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease}
.rl.v{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}
.rr{opacity:0;transform:translateX(28px);transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease}
.rr.v{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}
.d1{transition-delay:.08s}.d2{transition-delay:.16s}.d3{transition-delay:.24s}
.d4{transition-delay:.32s}.d5{transition-delay:.40s}.d6{transition-delay:.50s}

/* TYPOGRAPHY */
.ey{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--cyan2);margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.ey::before{content:'';width:22px;height:2px;background:var(--cyan);border-radius:1px}
h1.hero{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(52px,7.5vw,96px);line-height:.92;letter-spacing:-1px;color:var(--navy)}
h1.hero .hl{color:var(--cyan)}
h1.hero .out{-webkit-text-stroke:2px var(--navy);color:transparent}
h2.st{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(32px,4.2vw,56px);line-height:.95;letter-spacing:-.5px;color:var(--navy)}
h2.st .hl{color:var(--cyan)}
h2.st .hl2{color:var(--blue)}
h2.st .hlg{color:var(--green)}
p.lead{font-size:15px;line-height:1.75;color:var(--muted);font-weight:400}

/* CARDS */
.card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid rgba(0,194,224,.18);border-radius:14px;padding:20px;transition:all .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 2px 14px rgba(0,61,115,.05)}
.card::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--cyan),var(--blue));opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}
.card:hover::after{opacity:1}
.card:hover{border-color:rgba(0,194,224,.35);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 10px 36px rgba(0,61,115,.1)}
.card-nv{background:var(--navy);border:none;border-radius:14px;padding:20px;box-shadow:0 6px 28px rgba(0,61,115,.22)}

/* PILLS */
.pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:4px 11px;border-radius:50px;font-size:10px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase}
.pc{background:rgba(0,194,224,.1);color:var(--cyan2);border:1px solid rgba(0,194,224,.25)}
.pn{background:rgba(0,61,115,.08);color:var(--navy);border:1px solid rgba(0,61,115,.15)}
.pg{background:rgba(0,168,112,.1);color:var(--green);border:1px solid rgba(0,168,112,.2)}
.po{background:rgba(240,120,32,.1);color:var(--orange);border:1px solid rgba(240,120,32,.2)}
.pr{background:rgba(224,48,64,.1);color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(224,48,64,.2)}

/* STATS */
.stn{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:48px;line-height:1;color:var(--cyan)}
.stl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px}

/* BAR */
.bt{height:7px;background:var(--light);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden}
.bf{height:100%;border-radius:4px;width:0;transition:width 1.3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}

/* ACCROCHE */
.acc{padding:9px 16px 9px 18px;border-radius:7px;background:var(--lighter);border-left:3px solid var(--cyan);font-size:13px;color:var(--navy);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:7px}

/* COPY */
.cpbox{background:var(--lighter);border-radius:0 10px 10px 0;border-left:4px solid var(--cyan2);padding:16px 18px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.75;color:var(--muted);font-style:italic;position:relative;margin-top:14px}
.cptag{position:absolute;top:-10px;left:12px;background:var(--cyan);color:var(--white);font-size:9px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:2px;padding:2px 9px;border-radius:3px;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif}

/* FUNNEL */
.fst{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:11px 14px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--lighter);border:1px solid rgba(0,194,224,.12);margin-bottom:6px;transition:all .25s}
.fst:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);background:var(--light)}
.fn{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;flex-shrink:0}
.fa{text-align:center;color:var(--cyan);font-size:14px;margin:-1px 0}

/* TIMELINE */
.ti{display:flex;gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px}
.tdw{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0}
.td{width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--cyan);margin-top:3px;box-shadow:0 0 9px rgba(0,194,224,.4)}
.tl{width:1px;flex:1;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--cyan),var(--light));margin-top:3px}
.tp{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--cyan2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1px}
.tt{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5}

/* FEATURE */
.feat{background:var(--lighter);border:1px solid rgba(0,194,224,.15);border-radius:12px;padding:18px 12px;text-align:center;transition:all .35s}
.feat:hover{background:var(--navy);border-color:var(--cyan);transform:translateY(-7px);box-shadow:0 14px 36px rgba(0,61,115,.2)}
.feat:hover .fn2{color:var(--cyan)}
.feat:hover .fd{color:rgba(255,255,255,.55)}
.fi{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:9px;display:block}
.fn2{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--navy);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px}
.fd{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.4}

/* NEXT STEP */
.nst{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;padding:12px 16px;border-radius:11px;background:var(--lighter);border:1px solid rgba(0,194,224,.12);transition:all .3s;margin-bottom:7px}
.nst:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);background:var(--light);transform:translateX(4px)}
.nn{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--navy);color:var(--white);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0}

/* GRIDS */
.g2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;width:100%}
.g3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px;width:100%}
.g4{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;width:100%}
.g5{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:9px;width:100%}
.g7{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:8px;width:100%}

/* ATAG */
.at{display:inline-block;padding:3px 9px;background:var(--light);border:1px solid rgba(0,194,224,.2);border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--blue);margin:2px}

/* HDIV */
.hd{width:44px;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--cyan),transparent);border-radius:2px;margin:13px 0}

/* ALERT */
.alrt{background:rgba(240,120,32,.06);border:1px solid rgba(240,120,32,.2);border-radius:9px;padding:12px 16px;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6}

/* HPROG */
.hp{margin-bottom:13px}
.hph{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:5px}
.hpn{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy)}
.hpv{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:12px}
.hpt{height:6px;background:var(--light);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden}
.hpf{height:100%;border-radius:3px;width:0;transition:width 1.4s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}

/* WRING */
.wr{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(0,194,224,.12);animation:wx 5s linear infinite}
@keyframes wx{0%{transform:scale(.7);opacity:.5}100%{transform:scale(2.3);opacity:0}}

/* SC */
.sc{width:100%;max-width:1060px}

/* ROI TABLE */
.rtbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;font-size:12px}
.rtbl th{background:var(--navy);color:var(--white);font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:10px 12px;text-align:center}
.rtbl td{padding:9px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--light);text-align:center}
.rtbl tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--lighter)}
.rtbl tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;font-weight:800;background:rgba(0,194,224,.08);color:var(--navy)}
.rtbl td:first-child{text-align:left;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy)}

/* BUDGET MONTH */
.mbud{border-radius:10px;padding:10px 8px;text-align:center;border:1px solid var(--light);transition:all .3s}
.mbud:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.mbud .mn{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;color:var(--navy)}
.mbud .mv{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:18px}
.mbud .mb{height:5px;border-radius:3px;margin-top:6px;width:0;transition:width 1.3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}

/* COVER */
.cr{flex:0 0 380px;height:460px;border-radius:22px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 20px 56px rgba(0,61,115,.25)}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="bgc"></canvas>
<div id="cursor"></div>
<div id="cring"></div>

<header id="topbar">
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center">
    <div class="bbadge">Poolican</div>
    <div class="bsep"></div>
    <div class="bsub">Stratégie META Ads · Mars–Septembre 2026</div>
  </div>
  <div id="ctr"><span>01</span> / 13</div>
</header>

<div id="deck">

<!-- ═══ SLIDE 0 · COVER ═══ -->
<div class="slide active" id="s0">
  <div class="sc" style="display:flex;gap:56px;align-items:center">
    <div style="flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center">
      <div class="ey rv">Stratégie Publicité META · 2026</div>
      <h1 class="hero rv d1">La piscine<br><span class="out">gérée</span><br><span class="hl">en 1 clic.</span></h1>
      <div class="hd rv d2"></div>
      <p class="lead rv d2" style="max-width:440px">Plan complet META Ads — Notoriété · Leads B2B · Leads B2C.<br>
      <strong style="color:var(--navy)">Budget 90 000 € · Mars → Septembre 2026.</strong></p>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:24px;margin-top:28px" class="rv d3">
        <div><div class="stn">5</div><div class="stl">fonctions<br>en 1 boîtier</div></div>
        <div style="width:1px;background:var(--light)"></div>
        <div><div class="stn">3</div><div class="stl">campagnes<br>ciblées</div></div>
        <div style="width:1px;background:var(--light)"></div>
        <div><div class="stn">0</div><div class="stl">concurrent<br>direct</div></div>
        <div style="width:1px;background:var(--light)"></div>
        <div><div class="stn">90K</div><div class="stl">budget<br>total €</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cr rr d2">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Poolican" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:22px;opacity:.93"/>
      <div style="position:absolute;bottom:18px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:3;background:rgba(0,61,115,.82);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);padding:7px 18px;border-radius:28px;border:1px solid rgba(0,194,224,.3);white-space:nowrap">
        <span style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--cyan);text-transform:uppercase">Local Technique 5 en 1</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="position:absolute;bottom:64px;right:36px;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(0,61,115,.12)">Confidentiel · Poolstar Group · 2026</div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ SLIDE 1 · PRODUIT ═══ -->
<div class="slide" id="s1">
  <div class="sc">
    <div class="ey rv">Le produit</div>
    <h2 class="st rv d1">Poolican — <span class="hl">5 en 1</span> <span class="hl2">Plug & Play</span></h2>
    <p class="lead rv d2" style="max-width:620px;margin:10px 0 22px">Un seul boîtier. Une seule prise. Piscines jusqu'à 25m³ gérées depuis smartphone. <strong style="color:var(--navy)">Premier et unique sur le marché.</strong></p>
    <div class="g5 rv d3">
      <div class="feat"><span class="fi">🌀</span><div class="fn2">Pompe</div><div class="fd">Circulation 5,5m³/h · 140W</div></div>
      <div class="feat"><span class="fi">🔵</span><div class="fn2">Filtration</div><div class="fd">Cartouche lavable antibactérienne</div></div>
      <div class="feat"><span class="fi">🧂</span><div class="fn2">Électrolyseur</div><div class="fd">Traitement naturel au sel</div></div>
      <div class="feat"><span class="fi">🌡️</span><div class="fn2">PAC 5kW</div><div class="fd">Full Inverter · −80% énergie</div></div>
      <div class="feat"><span class="fi">💡</span><div class="fn2">Éclairage</div><div class="fd">Pilotage 12Vdc / 60W</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="g3 rv d4" style="margin-top:14px">
      <div class="card-nv" style="padding:16px 18px"><div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-bottom:3px">Garantie compresseur</div><div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:36px;color:var(--cyan)">5 ans</div></div>
      <div class="card-nv" style="padding:16px 18px"><div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-bottom:3px">Économie vs résistance</div><div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:36px;color:var(--cyan)">−80%</div></div>
      <div class="card-nv" style="padding:16px 18px"><div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-bottom:3px">Co-développé avec</div><div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:22px;color:var(--white);margin-top:5px">Poolstar × TCL</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ SLIDE 2 · BUDGET SAISONNIER ═══ -->
<div class="slide" id="s2">
  <div class="sc">
    <div class="ey rv">Budget · Mars → Septembre 2026</div>
    <h2 class="st rv d1">90 000 € investis<br><span class="hl">au bon moment.</span></h2>
    <p class="lead rv d2" style="margin:10px 0 24px;max-width:620px">Budget calé sur la saisonnalité piscine — montée en charge au printemps, pic en haute saison, décélération à la rentrée.</p>

    <div class="g7 rv d3" id="month-grid">
      <!-- Populated by JS -->
    </div>

    <div class="g3 rv d4" style="margin-top:14px">
      <div class="card" style="text-align:center;padding:16px">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px">Notoriété (20%)</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:30px;color:var(--blue)">18 000 €</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px">~2 570 €/mois</div>
      </div>
      <div class="card" style="text-align:center;padding:16px">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px">Leads B2B (30%)</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:30px;color:var(--green)">27 000 €</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px">~3 860 €/mois</div>
      </div>
      <div class="card" style="text-align:center;padding:16px">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px">Leads B2C (50%)</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:30px;color:var(--orange)">45 000 €</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px">~6 430 €/mois</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card rv d5" style="margin-top:12px;padding:13px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px">
      <span style="font-size:20px">💡</span>
      <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)">Le budget pic de <strong style="color:var(--navy)">mai–juillet</strong> représente 55% du budget total — c'est là que les Français achètent et installent leur piscine. On met le paquet au bon moment.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ SLIDE 3 · ROI & PROJECTIONS ═══ -->
<div class="slide" id="s3">
  <div class="sc">
    <div class="ey rv">Projections commerciales — Réalistes</div>
    <h2 class="st rv d1">Ce que les <span class="hlg">90 000 €</span><br>vont générer.</h2>
    <p class="lead rv d2" style="margin:10px 0 18px;max-width:640px">Estimations conservatives basées sur les benchmarks META secteur équipement maison · Prix produit <strong style="color:var(--navy)">1 666 € HT</strong> · Taux de closing adaptés à la réalité des ménages français.</p>

    <div class="rv d3" style="overflow:hidden;border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,61,115,.08)">
      <table class="rtbl">
        <thead>
          <tr>

    <h2 class="st rv d1">Ce qu'on mesure.<br><span class="hl">Ce qu'on optimise.</span></h2>
    <div class="g2 rv d2" style="margin-top:20px;gap:18px">
      <div>
        <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:12px">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--cyan2);margin-bottom:14px">📊 KPIs par campagne</div>
          <div class="hp"><div class="hph"><span class="hpn">📢 Notoriété — CPM</span><span class="hpv" style="color:var(--blue)">Cible &lt; 8 €</span></div><div class="hpt"><div class="hpf" data-w="60" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--blue),var(--cyan))"></div></div></div>
          <div class="hp"><div class="hph"><span class="hpn">🏗️ B2B — CPL</span><span class="hpv" style="color:var(--green)">Cible &lt; 25 €</span></div><div class="hpt"><div class="hpf" data-w="75" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#009060,var(--green))"></div></div></div>
          <div class="hp"><div class="hph"><span class="hpn">🏠 B2C — CPL</span><span class="hpv" style="color:var(--orange)">Cible &lt; 15 €</span></div><div class="hpt"><div class="hpf" data-w="85" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#C45B00,var(--orange))"></div></div></div>
          <div class="hp" style="margin-bottom:0"><div class="hph"><span class="hpn">🖱️ CTR global</span><span class="hpv" style="color:var(--cyan2)">Cible &gt; 1.5%</span></div><div class="hpt"><div class="hpf" data-w="50" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--blue),var(--cyan))"></div></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="alrt">
          <strong style="color:var(--orange)">🚨 Alertes :</strong> CPL B2B &gt; 50 € → couper · CPL B2C &gt; 30 € → changer accroche · CTR &lt; 0.8% → renouveler créas · Fréquence &gt; 5 → fatigue
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:12px">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--cyan2);margin-bottom:12px">📅 Calendrier optimisation</div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;line-height:2;color:var(--muted)">
            <div><span style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;color:var(--cyan)">Mars</span> — Setup + Pixel + LP + lancement Notoriété</div>
            <div><span style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;color:var(--blue)">Avril</span> — Lancement B2C + B2B · Montée en budget</div>
            <div><span style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;color:var(--green)">Mai–Juil.</span> — Pic budget · Retargeting · Lookalike · Scaling</div>
            <div><span style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;color:var(--orange)">Août–Sept.</span> — Décélération · Bilan · Optimisation leads chauds</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--cyan2);margin-bottom:10px">🏆 Règles d'or</div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7">Ne modifier qu'un élément à la fois · Budget ≤ +20%/semaine · Tester 2–3 accroches par ad set dès le départ · Documenter chaque modification</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ SLIDE 10 · CLÉMENT LÉDI ═══ -->
<div class="slide" id="s10">
  <div class="sc">
    <div class="ey rv">L'humain derrière la stratégie</div>
    <h2 class="st rv d1"><span class="hl">Clément Lédi</span><br>Expert Poolican.</h2>

    <div class="g2 rv d2" style="margin-top:22px;gap:18px;align-items:start">
      <!-- LEFT: Role card -->
      <div>
        <div class="card-nv" style="padding:24px;margin-bottom:14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden">
          <div style="position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:120px;height:120px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,194,224,.18) 0%,transparent 70%)"></div>
          <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-bottom:6px">Rôle dans la stratégie</div>
          <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:26px;color:var(--white);line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:16px">Analyste & Qualificateur<br><span style="color:var(--cyan)">des leads entrants</span></div>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:8px">
              <span style="font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0">🔍</span>
              <div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white)">Analyse chaque lead entrant</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)">B2B et B2C — qualification manuelle à forte valeur</div></div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:8px">
              <span style="font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0">🗺️</span>
              <div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white)">Oriente vers le bon canal</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)">E-commerce direct ou pro référencé en région</div></div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:8px">
              <span style="font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0">🤝</span>
              <div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white)">Accompagne la décision d'achat</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)">Conseil personnalisé · Réponse sous 24h</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- RIGHT: Flow diagram -->
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:12px">Arbre de décision leads</div>

        <!-- Lead entrant -->
        <div style="text-align:center;padding:10px 16px;background:var(--navy);border-radius:9px;color:var(--white);font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:14px;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:8px">
          📬 LEAD ENTRANT (B2B ou B2C)
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:center;color:var(--cyan);font-size:18px;margin:4px 0">↓</div>

        <!-- Clément qualifie -->
        <div style="text-align:center;padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(0,194,224,.12);border:1.5px solid var(--cyan);border-radius:9px;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:8px">
          🎯 CLÉMENT LÉDI — Analyse & Qualification
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:6px;margin:4px 0;color:var(--cyan);font-size:14px">
          <span>↙</span><span style="flex:1;max-width:20px"></span><span>↘</span>
        </div>

        <!-- Two paths -->
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px">
          <!-- B2C path -->
          <div>
            <div style="padding:10px 12px;background:rgba(240,120,32,.08);border:1px solid rgba(240,120,32,.25);border-radius:9px;margin-bottom:6px">
              <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:11px;color:var(--orange);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px">🏠 Particulier</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5">Redirection vers <strong style="color:var(--navy)">e-commerce</strong> ou <strong style="color:var(--navy)">pro en région</strong> référencé Poolican</div>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align:center;color:var(--orange);font-size:14px;margin:2px 0">↓</div>
            <div style="padding:8px 10px;background:var(--lighter);border-radius:7px;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;line-height:1.4">
              Achat en ligne<br>ou installation pro locale
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- B2B path -->
          <div>
            <div style="padding:10px 12px;background:rgba(0,168,112,.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,168,112,.25);border-radius:9px;margin-bottom:6px">
              <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:11px;color:var(--green);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px">🏗️ Professionnel</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5">Accompagnement décision · référencement · intégration catalogue</div>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align:center;color:var(--green);font-size:14px;margin:2px 0">↓</div>
            <div style="padding:8px 10px;background:var(--lighter);border-radius:7px;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;line-height:1.4">
              Partenariat pro<br>ou <strong style="color:var(--navy)">Démo terrain ★</strong>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

  <div class="sc">

    <div class="g2 rv d2" style="margin-top:20px;gap:18px;align-items:start">
      <!-- LEFT: The promise -->
      <div>
        <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy) 0%,#005A9E 100%);border-radius:16px;padding:26px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:14px;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,61,115,.25)">
          <!-- Decorative -->
          <div style="position:absolute;top:-20px;right:-20px;width:120px;height:120px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(0,194,224,.12)"></div>
          <div style="position:absolute;bottom:-30px;left:-10px;width:90px;height:90px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(0,194,224,.07)"></div>

          <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-bottom:8px">Service exclusif · Leads B2B premium</div>
          <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:22px;color:var(--white);line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:18px">
            Clément Lédi se déplace.<br>
            <span style="color:var(--cyan)">Le Poolican parle pour lui.</span>
          </div>

          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
              <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--cyan);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:13px">🚗</div>
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75)">Déplacement en région sur les leads B2B à fort potentiel</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
              <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--cyan);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:13px">🔧</div>
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75)">Démo en conditions réelles avec un technicien Poolex qualifié</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
              <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--cyan);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:13px">📲</div>
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75)">Démonstration app, connectivité, installation Plug & Play en live</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
              <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:13px">🏆</div>
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75)">Le pro voit le produit. Il l'installe. Il le référence dans son catalogue.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Credibility tag -->
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(0,194,224,.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,194,224,.2);border-radius:10px">
          <span style="font-size:20px">💬</span>
          <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;font-style:italic">"Un pro qui voit le Poolican installé et qui tourne, c'est un pro qui le propose à ses 20 prochains clients."</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- RIGHT: Qualification criteria + process -->
      <div>
        <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:12px;border-left:3px solid var(--cyan)">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--cyan2);margin-bottom:12px">🎯 Critères déclenchant une démo terrain</div>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:12px">
              <span style="width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--navy);color:var(--white);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;flex-shrink:0">✓</span>
              <span style="color:var(--muted)">Pro installe <strong style="color:var(--navy)">+ de 5 piscines / an</strong></span>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:12px">
              <span style="width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--navy);color:var(--white);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;flex-shrink:0">✓</span>
              <span style="color:var(--muted)">Déjà intéressé par <strong style="color:var(--navy)">référencer un produit tout-en-un</strong></span>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:12px">
              <span style="width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--navy);color:var(--white);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;flex-shrink:0">✓</span>
              <span style="color:var(--muted)">Pose des mini-piscines ou travaille sur <strong style="color:var(--navy)">bassins &lt; 25m³</strong></span>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:12px">
              <span style="width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--navy);color:var(--white);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:800;flex-shrink:0">✓</span>
              <span style="color:var(--muted)">Échange téléphonique préalable <strong style="color:var(--navy)">positif avec Clément</strong></span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="card">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--cyan2);margin-bottom:12px">📋 Processus démo en 4 étapes</div>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px">
            <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start">
              <div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--cyan);color:var(--white);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:12px;flex-shrink:0">1</div>
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);padding-top:3px"><strong style="color:var(--navy)">Qualification lead</strong> — Clément contacte le pro sous 24h</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start">
              <div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--cyan);color:var(--white);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:12px;flex-shrink:0">2</div>
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);padding-top:3px"><strong style="color:var(--navy)">Confirmation potentiel</strong> — critères vérifiés, démo programmée</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start">
              <div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--cyan);color:var(--white);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:12px;flex-shrink:0">3</div>
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);padding-top:3px"><strong style="color:var(--navy)">Démo terrain</strong> — Clément + technicien Poolex sur installation réelle</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start">
              <div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--navy);color:var(--cyan);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:12px;flex-shrink:0">4</div>
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);padding-top:3px"><strong style="color:var(--navy)">Référencement</strong> — le pro intègre Poolican à son catalogue client</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ SLIDE 10 · NEXT STEPS ═══ -->
<div class="slide" id="s12">
  <div class="sc" style="max-width:860px">
    <div class="ey rv">On passe à l'action</div>
    <h2 class="st rv d1">La stratégie est validée.<br><span class="hl">On exécute maintenant.</span></h2>
    <p class="lead rv d2" style="margin:10px 0 20px;font-size:13px">6 livrables à construire ensemble — dans l'ordre.</p>
    <div class="rv d3">
      <div class="nst"><div class="nn">1</div><div style="flex:1"><strong style="font-size:13px;color:var(--navy)">Textes d'annonces complets</strong><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">Copy final B2B + B2C + Notoriété — prêts à coller dans META Ads Manager</div></div><span class="pill pg">✅ Prêt</span></div>
      <div class="nst"><div class="nn">2</div><div style="flex:1"><strong style="font-size:13px;color:var(--navy)">Landing Pages B2C et B2B en HTML</strong><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">Code complet prêt à déployer — Webflow, Systeme.io ou hébergement direct</div></div><span class="pill pg">✅ Prêt</span></div>
      <div class="nst"><div class="nn">3</div><div style="flex:1"><strong style="font-size:13px;color:var(--navy)">Brief créatif visuels & vidéos</strong><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">Instructions pour graphiste / agence — format, ton, message, durée</div></div><span class="pill pc">✅ Prêt</span></div>
      <div class="nst"><div class="nn">4</div><div style="flex:1"><strong style="font-size:13px;color:var(--navy)">Tableau de suivi KPI hebdomadaire</strong><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">Fichier Excel/Sheets avec formules et alertes automatiques</div></div><span class="pill pc">✅ Prêt</span></div>
      <div class="nst"><div class="nn">5</div><div style="flex:1"><strong style="font-size:13px;color:var(--navy)">Guide META Ads Manager pas-à-pas</strong><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">Configuration technique campagne par campagne, écran par écran</div></div><span class="pill po">📋 Sur demande</span></div>
      <div class="nst"><div class="nn">6</div><div style="flex:1"><strong style="font-size:13px;color:var(--navy)">Stratégie de scaling M2–M7</strong><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">Plan d'optimisation basé sur les résultats réels mois par mois</div></div><span class="pill po">📋 Après M1</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div><!-- #deck -->

<nav id="nav">
  <button class="nbtn" id="np">←</button>
  <button class="ndot active" data-s="0"></button>
  <button class="ndot" data-s="1"></button>
  <button class="ndot" data-s="2"></button>
  <button class="ndot" data-s="3"></button>
  <button class="ndot" data-s="4"></button>
  <button class="ndot" data-s="5"></button>
  <button class="ndot" data-s="6"></button>
  <button class="ndot" data-s="7"></button>
  <button class="ndot" data-s="8"></button>
  <button class="ndot" data-s="9"></button>
  <button class="ndot" data-s="10"></button>
  <button class="ndot" data-s="11"></button>
  <button class="ndot" data-s="12"></button>
  <button class="nbtn" id="nn">→</button>
</nav>

<script>
// CURSOR
const cur=document.getElementById('cursor'),ring=document.getElementById('cring');
let mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{mx=e.clientX;my=e.clientY});
(function a(){rx+=(mx-rx)*.16;ry+=(my-ry)*.16;cur.style.left=mx+'px';cur.style.top=my+'px';ring.style.left=rx+'px';ring.style.top=ry+'px';requestAnimationFrame(a)})();
document.addEventListener('mousedown',()=>cur.style.transform='translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.5)');
document.addEventListener('mouseup',()=>cur.style.transform='translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1)');

// CANVAS
const cv=document.getElementById('bgc'),cx=cv.getContext('2d');
let W,H,pts=[];
function rsz(){W=cv.width=window.innerWidth;H=cv.height=window.innerHeight}
rsz();window.addEventListener('resize',rsz);
for(let i=0;i<40;i++)pts.push({x:Math.random()*2000,y:Math.random()*1200,r:Math.random()*.7+.2,vx:(Math.random()-.5)*.2,vy:(Math.random()-.5)*.2});
(function bg(){
  cx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
  cx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,194,224,0.04)';cx.lineWidth=1;
  for(let x=0;x<W;x+=100){cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(x,0);cx.lineTo(x,H);cx.stroke()}
  for(let y=0;y<H;y+=100){cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(0,y);cx.lineTo(W,y);cx.stroke()}
  let g=cx.createRadialGradient(W*.08,H*.12,0,W*.08,H*.12,320);
  g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,121,191,0.05)');g.addColorStop(1,'transparent');cx.fillStyle=g;cx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
  let g2=cx.createRadialGradient(W*.92,H*.88,0,W*.92,H*.88,260);
  g2.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,194,224,0.04)');g2.addColorStop(1,'transparent');cx.fillStyle=g2;cx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
  pts.forEach(p=>{p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;if(p.x<0)p.x=W;if(p.x>W)p.x=0;if(p.y<0)p.y=H;if(p.y>H)p.y=0;cx.beginPath();cx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.r,0,Math.PI*2);cx.fillStyle='rgba(0,121,191,0.12)';cx.fill()});
  requestAnimationFrame(bg);
})();

// MONTH BUDGET DATA
const months=[
  {m:'Mars',v:6000,pct:37,col:'#0079BF'},
  {m:'Avril',v:9000,pct:56,col:'#0099B8'},
  {m:'Mai',v:16000,pct:100,col:'#00C2E0'},
  {m:'Juin',v:18000,pct:100,col:'#00C2E0'},
  {m:'Juillet',v:17000,pct:100,col:'#00C2E0'},
  {m:'Août',v:14000,pct:87,col:'#0099B8'},
  {m:'Sept.',v:10000,pct:62,col:'#0079BF'},
];
const mg=document.getElementById('month-grid');
months.forEach(m=>{
  const d=document.createElement('div');
  d.className='mbud';
  d.innerHTML=`<div class="mn">${m.m}</div><div class="mv" style="color:${m.col}">${(m.v/1000).toFixed(0)}K€</div><div class="mb" data-w="${m.pct}" style="background:${m.col}"></div>`;
  mg.appendChild(d);
});

// SLIDES
let cs=0;const TOTAL=13;
const slides=document.querySelectorAll('.slide');
const dots=document.querySelectorAll('.ndot');
const ctr=document.getElementById('ctr');

function goTo(n){
  if(n<0||n>=TOTAL)return;
  slides[cs].classList.remove('active');dots[cs].classList.remove('active');
  cs=n;slides[cs].classList.add('active');dots[cs].classList.add('active');
  ctr.innerHTML=`<span>${String(cs+1).padStart(2,'0')}</span> / ${String(TOTAL).padStart(2,'0')}`;
  setTimeout(()=>{
    slides[cs].querySelectorAll('.rv,.rl,.rr').forEach(el=>el.classList.add('v'));
    slides[cs].querySelectorAll('.bf').forEach(el=>{el.style.width=el.dataset.w+'%'});
    slides[cs].querySelectorAll('.hpf').forEach(el=>{el.style.width=el.dataset.w+'%'});
    slides[cs].querySelectorAll('.mb').forEach(el=>{el.style.width=el.dataset.w+'%'});
  },80);
}

setTimeout(()=>{slides[0].querySelectorAll('.rv,.rl,.rr').forEach(el=>el.classList.add('v'))},150);

dots.forEach(d=>d.addEventListener('click',()=>goTo(+d.dataset.s)));
document.getElementById('np').addEventListener('click',()=>goTo(cs-1));
document.getElementById('nn').addEventListener('click',()=>goTo(cs+1));
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
  if(e.key==='ArrowRight'||e.key===' ')goTo(cs+1);
  if(e.key==='ArrowLeft')goTo(cs-1);
});
let tx=0;
document.addEventListener('touchstart',e=>tx=e.touches[0].clientX);
document.addEventListener('touchend',e=>{const dx=e.changedTouches[0].clientX-tx;if(Math.abs(dx)>50)goTo(dx<0?cs+1:cs-1)});
</script>
</body>
</html>
